title: Pangrapport från ABB: "Datacenter drar"
summary_md:
# Pangrapport från ABB: "Datacenter drar"

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-04-22  
**Market Sentiment**: Positive

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

The episode is a single-company interview with ABB's CEO following a strong Q1 2026 report, with order intake crossing $11bn (+24%) and operational EBITDA margin of 23.5%. Datacenter demand is the standout driver with triple-digit growth, while the broader electrification and energy-transition trends underpin a multi-decade growth runway. ABB raised its 2026 organic revenue growth guidance, signalling high conviction in continued strength.

---

## Universe Stocks

### 🟢 ABB — ABB | **BUY** (Strong)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: LT  
**Confidence**: 80%

Record order intake +24%, backlog $27.5bn (+22%), raised 2026 guidance, triple-digit datacenter growth and a multi-decade electrification tailwind.

#### Reasoning

ABB beat its own organic growth guidance (11% vs 7-10%) and raised the full-year target to high-single/low-double digit. Datacenter orders grew >100% with proprietary medium-voltage UPS tech and hyperscaler relationships; CEO sees no slowdown but acceleration over a 4-5 year and even 20-30 year electrification horizon. Backlog of $27.5bn and broad short-cycle strength across all three divisions support durable momentum.

#### Sell Triggers

- if datacenter capex peaks and orders decelerate
- if Middle East conflict materially disrupts operations beyond ~3.5% of revenue
- if organic growth falls below raised guidance
- if EBITDA margin compresses

> *"Vi kom ett väldigt starkt igång i 2026. Vi hade 24 procent ordertillväxt... Klart, datacenter är det som drar mycket av tillväxten. Vi snackar om det är tresiffrigt tillväxt."*

---
